ctxMarket: Attention is concentrated on Solana’s quantum-resistant roadmap and the recent integration of major DeFi protocols following a large exploit elsewhere. Whale activity and inflows are keeping SOL price within a defined range, but no clear breakout is indicated.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s detailed plan for transitioning to quantum-resistant cryptography, with consensus around Falcon digital signatures.
• Aave’s move to Solana after a major DeFi exploit, expanding lending protocol access for Solana users.
• Western Union’s upcoming Solana-based stablecoin for agent settlements.
ctxMatters:
Solana’s quantum-proofing efforts signal long-term network security planning as industry concerns shift from theory to practical readiness.  
Aave’s integration could reshape liquidity and usage patterns on Solana, especially after recent DeFi vulnerabilities.  
Western Union’s stablecoin launch highlights growing institutional interest in Solana’s infrastructure.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Coordinated quantum-resistance planning and major DeFi integrations show active network evolution.
Noise: Short-term speculation around whale movements lacks broader context.
ctxGlossary:
Falcon — A quantum-resistant digital signature scheme.
TVL (Total Value Locked) — The total value of assets deposited in a DeFi protocol.

readMore.title: Solana outlines quantum-proof roadmap as crypto shifts from theory to preparation
Solana developers outline plan to protect network from quantum threats
Latest $290M exploit hit DeFi so hard it forced Aave onto Solana as part of rescue efforts
